messages.content: Could you please provide the exact model of your bike? This will help me find the right charger for you.
Could you please confirm the exact model name and version of your bike? This will help me assist you better in finding the correct charger.
Could you please specify which version of the Viper you have? This will help me find the correct charger for you.
Could you please provide the year of your True Timber Viper? This will help me find the correct charger for you.
The 2022 True Timber Viper uses the RP-11-02-07 charger, which is a standard 48V 2A charger. Just say 'order it' and I'll create a direct secure checkout link for you.
